---
title: "a_test"
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(sdbuildR)
```

```{r}
sfm <- sdbuildR("predator_prey") |> sim_settings(language = "julia")
```

```{r}
use_julia()
```

```{r}
sim <- simulate(sfm)
```

```{r}
use_julia(stop = TRUE)
```
